--unique.help: Get unique results, discard self/mutual duplicate lines/keys (key = captured groups[1] if set 1~2 Regex patterns).

--intersection.help: Get mutual lines/keys intersection in 2 files or file-with-pipe (default is exclusive: 'not-in-latter').

--ignore-case.help: Ignore case for plain text matching and Regex matching.

--out-not-captured.help: Also output not-captured keys/lines of Regex pattern in first file/pipe.

--percentage.help: Output percentages of keys/lines at each line head, and sort by percentages.

--out-whole-line.help: Output matched lines other than keys (key = captured groups[1] of Regex pattern).

--ascending.help: Ascending sort output by lines or captured-keys or percentages.

--descending.help: Descending sort output by lines or captured-keys or percentages.

--stop-at-count.help: Stop if the matched count of a key/line > [N] when ascending output, or if count < [N] when descending output.

--stop-percentage.help: Stop if the percentage of a key/line > [P%] when ascending output, or if percentage < [P%] when descending output.

--no-any-info.help: Not output any info, no warnings no summary (if no errors), only pure result (Please always use -PAC or -PC).

--info-normal-out.help: Output summary info to stdout (default is to stderr).

--out-not-0-sum.help: Output summary only if the results count is not 0.

--no-color.help: No color for output (it's better to not add color if have subsequent matching or processing).

--head.help: Output top [N] rows of whole output if N > 0; Skip top [N] lines if N < 0; [N] = 0 means not output.

--tail.help: Output bottom [N] rows of whole output if N > 0; Skip bottom [N] lines if N < 0; [N] = 0 means not output.

--jump-out.help: Jump out (stop and exit) if has set -H [N] and already has output [N] lines.

--switch-first.help: Switch positions (first/latter roles) of 2 files or file/pipe (also will switch their Regex patterns).

--skip-last-empty.help: Skip last empty line in first/latter file.

--has-text.help: Line must contain this normal/plain text (Can use meanwhile: -t, -x, --nt, --nx).

--text-match.help: Regex pattern for line text must match (Can use meanwhile: -t, -x, --nt, --nx). Use -t value to filter even if used -e.

--enhance.help: Regex pattern to color output, inferior to: -t -x. Use merged Regex value of "(-t)|-e" to enhance if used both -t and -e.

--not-from-pipe.help: Force reading from files other than pipe (to avoid reading pipe if running in another command).

--show-command.help: Show command line, you can append text for debug, or extraction after -c (if append text, -c and text must be last).

--help.help: See usage and examples below. More detail: https://github.com/qualiu/msr

--colors.help: Set fore_back colors for -t/-e/-x;d/f/p;m/u like: 'Red' or 't=Red,x=Yellow,e=Green' or 't = red + Yellow_Blue, x = Cyan'.

--keep-color.help: Keep color of output result for Windows/MinGW - to be uniform color style with Cygwin/Linux/MacOS.

--unix-slash.help: Set 1 to output uniform forward slash '/' on Windows + MinGW + Cygwin, like 'c:/' instead of '/c/' or '/cygdrive/c/'.

--to-stderr.help: Output result to stderr. Default: result -> stdout, error/warn/info/verbose -> stderr.

--sum.help: Sum accumulative counts and percentages(if used -p) for each key/line.

--not-warn-bom.help: Not output BOM warnings when reading BOM files which BOM header bytes != 0xEFBBBF.

--timeout.help: Maximum waiting seconds to stop and exit. No limit if value <= 0. Default = 0.000 s.

--nx.help: Line must not contain normal/plain text: Exclude/Skip rows.

--nt.help: Regex pattern for lines must not match: Exclude/Skip rows.

--exit.help: Change return value, format: [Number] or [Regex-or-Math]-to-[Exit-Code], like: '1' or '-?\d+-to-1' or 'lt0-to-1,255-to-1'.

--verbose.help: Show parsed arguments, return value, time zone, BOM rows and EXE path, etc.
